comment: Synthetic fit AML 1L patient, age 38, CBF AML with inv(16)(p13.1q22) / CBFB::MYH11 fusion, ELN-favorable. Engine routes ALGO-AML-1L step 1 (no emergency) → step 2 (no frailty/organ) → step 3 (RF-AML-CORE-BINDING-FACTOR-FAVORABLE fires via inv_16 / cbfb_myh11_fusion / aml_eln_risk=favorable) → step 4 → IND-AML-1L-7-3 (aggressive track; gemtuzumab ozogamicin add-on per ALFA-0701 / AML-19 surfaced as MDT-level recommendation at regimen layer — no dedicated 7+3+GO indication in KB; HiDAC consolidation × 3-4; no upfront alloHCT in CR1 per ELN-2022 favorable risk).

primary_diagnosis.disease_entity: Acute Myeloid Leukemia with inv(16)(p13.1q22) / CBFB::MYH11 (CBF AML), de novo, eosinophil-rich (M4Eo morphology)

fitness_assessment.rationale: Age 38, no comorbidities, ECOG 0, normal organ function → fit for intensive 7+3 + GO

clinical_record.planned_regimen_notes: 7+3 induction (cytarabine 200 mg/m² CIVI d1-7 + daunorubicin 60 mg/m² d1-3) + fractionated gemtuzumab ozogamicin 3 mg/m² d1, d4, d7 per ALFA-0701 (Castaigne 2012) — CBF AML benefits with HR 0.69 for OS; HiDAC consolidation 3 g/m² q12h d1, 3, 5 × 3-4 cycles; MRD monitoring via RT-qPCR for CBFB::MYH11 transcript every 3 mo for 2 years; alloHCT NOT recommended in CR1 per ELN-2022 favorable risk — reserved for MRD-positive after consolidation or relapse.
